scenes.title: Stargazing at a Historic Observatory

place_candidates.name: Lick Observatory
place_candidates.address: 7281 Mt Hamilton Rd, Mt Hamilton, CA 95140

scenes.notes: Experience the clear night sky and learn about astronomy from a historic mountaintop observatory.

scenes.title: Golden Gate Bridge Sunrise through the Fog
scenes.notes: Witness the iconic Golden Gate Bridge emerge from the morning fog, bathed in the golden light of sunrise.
